name: Abdalla Mostafa
about:
I'm Abdalla Mostafa, Senior Software Engineer. I have been fascinated by technology since I got my first computer in 2000. What started as simple curiosity quickly turned into a passion for building customized, efficient tools that solve real-world problems. 

Today, I bring that same enthusiasm to every project I take on. Over the last three years, I have helped deliver over 20 projects, focusing on creating seamless experiences that simplify how companies operate. I believe that technology should work for you—not the other way around. My goal is always to build systems that save time, provide clear data for better decision-making, and create a smoother experience for your customers.

How I can help your business:
- Web Development:
I design and build websites that connect you directly to your customers and open new doors for sales.
- Process Automation:
I set up server solutions and internal tools that handle repetitive daily tasks, freeing up your time to focus on growth. 
- Payment Integration: 
I implement fast, reliable payment systems that encourage customer purchases and eliminate the need for manual tracking.
- Data-Driven Insights:
With a background in Data Science from the Faculty of Computers and Data Science, I don't just build systems; I ensure they produce the data you need to make confident, informed business decisions.
I am always looking for new challenges that turn complex operations into simple, effective workflows. Let’s connect and see how we can streamline your business.

education.degree: Bachelor in Computing and Data Science
education.institution: Faculty of Computers and Data Science, Alexandria University

star_factors.situation: Westbazaar is a global e-commerce platform designed to ship products worldwide, but its growth was severely restricted by a legacy codebase and a rigid, outdated UI/UX. Our inventory expansion was bottlenecked: we were capped at a total catalog of 70,000 items and could only process 200 new product imports per day.
star_factors.task: To unlock the platform's potential, I needed to modernize the system for massive scale. My goals were to drastically increase our daily product import capacity, overhaul the UI/UX for a seamless customer journey, and integrate cryptocurrency payments to better serve our international user base.
star_factors.action:
- Scaled the Architecture: I overhauled the ingestion pipeline by implementing message queues and dynamic server workers, allowing the system to process data asynchronously.
- Optimized Data Ingestion: I re-engineered how we handled 3rd-party API rate limits, maximizing our data pull efficiency without hitting throttling blocks.
- Modernized the Experience: I championed the transition from a clunky interface to a modern, user-friendly UI/UX, removing friction from the buying process.
- Expanded Payment Options: I integrated Cregis into the checkout flow to enable secure, seamless cryptocurrency transactions.
star_factors.result:
- Exploded daily product imports from 200 up to 13,000 per day.
- Expanded the active product catalog to over 400,000+ items.
- Successfully doubled customer conversion, driving a 100% increase in monthly orders.

star_factors.situation: JobSolv's recruitment workflow was bottlenecked by a highly inefficient, manual screening process. Recruiters were spending countless hours reviewing thousands of applications by hand. This heavy administrative burden created severe downstream effects: high candidate leakage, increasing churn rates, and ultimately, lost placement opportunities.
star_factors.task: The objective was to engineer a unified, automated platform that could handle the heavy lifting of the screening process. The goal was to eliminate the manual bottleneck and create a system capable of rapidly and accurately matching high-value candidates with high-paying job opportunities.
star_factors.action: - Engineered an ML-Driven Parser: I developed an intelligent applicant tracking parser that utilizes machine learning to automatically extract key skills and experience from incoming resumes.- Implemented Real-Time Scoring: I built a backend evaluation engine that instantly scores these parsed candidates against open job specifications the moment they apply.- Streamlined Recruiter Workflow: I designed the system to surface top-tier applicants immediately, explicitly highlighting the precise skill overlaps between the candidate's profile and the job requirements so recruiters could make split-second, informed decisions.
star_factors.result:
- Slashed the overall recruitment cycle time by 60%.- Improved the precision of candidate placements, increasing match quality by 45%.
- Eliminated thousands of hours of manual review, boosting the recruitment team's overall productivity by 80%.

star_factors.situation: EasyGo Holiday Homes, a property rental company preparing to launch their services in Dubai. While the website was functional, the overall user experience felt outdated and sluggish. It also had several pain points: the checkout process was restricted to just credit card payments, and user account management was handled entirely through clunky email threads, creating unnecessary friction for our customers.
star_factors.task: My goal was to completely modernize and streamline the platform. I was tasked with designing a seamless, end-to-end user journey—from the moment a user started browsing properties to selecting a service, making a secure payment, and eventually tracking their past and upcoming reservations in one place.
star_factors.action:
- Interactive Map Browsing: I designed an intuitive, map-based user flow so clients could visually explore and select properties across Dubai.
- Flexible Payment Gateways: I overhauled the checkout process by integrating modern, versatile payment options—including Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, and payment links—making it incredibly easy for international travelers to book.
- User Dashboard: I built out a comprehensive account section where users could easily manage and review their history of previous and upcoming reservations.
- Content Strategy: I introduced an "Articles" section featuring content about the Dubai landscape and local attractions to engage users and build brand authority.
star_factors.result:
- We achieved a massive 80% increase in user reservations by removing friction from the booking process.
- The newly added articles section significantly improved the platform's SEO, driving more organic traffic to the site.
- Because of the smoother, more intuitive experience, we saw a 20% increase in positive customer reviews.
